sqlCommands.descr: update TransX set Flex3 = '2381' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2150000','3590602')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2383' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284')
update TransX set Flex3 = '4601' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('4601','4611') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '4611' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('4601','4611') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5607' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5607','5613') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5613' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5607','5613') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5655' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5655','5670') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5670' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5655','5670') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set Flex3 = '5657' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5657','5672') and BusCat in ('A','D')
update TransX set Flex3 = '5672' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 in ('5657','5672') and BusCat = 'C'
update TransX set TP = '' from TransX t inner join Sets s on t.TP = s.FromVal where  t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and s.ID = 'ZTP006'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FX Equity' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '35%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FX P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '4398%' and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'FH P&L' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '4415%' or GL in ('4418900','6828900')) and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Other' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP, Amt1,Flex4) (select KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2), 'pass1' as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Flex1, Co, GL, BusCat, TP)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Flex4 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0
update x set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX x inner join COA c on x.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set Flex3 = cast(m.Field2 as varchar) from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'FFH TP' and x.GL like m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update x set Flex3 = cast(m.Field2 as varchar) from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'FFH TP' and x.GL = m.Field3 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '(4) Re-entry'
Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when Co like '599%' then '(2) Back-out' else '(1) IFRS 4' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Ceded', Flex2 = 'no', Flex5 = 'non-affiliate', Amt2 = Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat >= '20' and BusCat <= '29'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Direct' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'yes' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '%96' or GL like '%98')
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.ID and t.Flex1 = m.Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'GL Sched F'
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((substring(GL,1,1) = '4' and Flex1 <> 'Ceded') or (substring(GL,1,1) = '5' and Flex1 = 'Ceded'))
update TransX set TP = Field1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on ReinName = Descr where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'TP Sched F' and TP is NULL
update TransX set CC = '1EAI000000', PC = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CostCenter = 1
update TransX set Flex5 = 'affiliate' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP <> ''
update TransX set Flex4 = m.Name, Flex6 = m.SchedFname, Division = m.NAIC, Location = m.FedID from TransX t inner join Brokers m on t.ReinName = m.Broker where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set TPname = m.Name, Flex6 = m.SchedFname, Division = coalesce(m.NAIC,Division,''), Location = coalesce(m.FedID,Location,'') from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Delete from IR17_Other_Singapore where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R67' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,TransCode,Flex1) (Select '[batchID]',ID,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'TransCode')

Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','15','23') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('287','216','461') or GL in ('5608913','5608970','5608972')) and  not GL like '155%' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not BusCat in ('A','D','C')
update TransX set Flex3 = '3100' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('3870002','3870003')
update TransX set Flex3 = '2099' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1570000','2170000')
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '441%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, Amt1) (select KeyID, Flex3,'(3) variance' as Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('(1) IFRS 4','(2) Back-out')  group by KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, Amt1) (select KeyID, Flex3,'(5) variance' as Flex1, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP, round(sum(Amt1),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 in ('(2) Back-out','(4) Re-entry')  group by KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, GLdesc, BusCat, TP)

Insert into IR17_Other_Canada (Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select Co,Crcy,Flex1,YearPeriod,GL,GLDesc,PC,PCdesc,Flex3,CC,CCdesc,CCCat,Flex5,TP,'R67',Flex4,'A',Flex9,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD '
update TransX set CC = '1EAI000000', PC = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CostCenter = 1
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL = '4498000')
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'B' and Flex1 = '(1) IFRS 4'
Update TransX set Flex1 = '(4) Re-entry' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G24'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Assumed' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '13%' or GL = '2854600')
update TransX set Amt2 = -Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,1) = '2' and not (Flex1 = 'Ceded' and substring(GL,1,2) = '28') and not GL = '2854600'

Insert into IR17_Other (Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select Co,Crcy,Flex1,YearPeriod,GL,GLDesc,PC,PCdesc,Flex3,CC,CCdesc,CCCat,Flex5,TP,'R67',Flex4,'A',Flex9,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY '

Insert into IR17_Other_Singapore (Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select Co,Crcy,Flex1,YearPeriod,GL,GLDesc,PC,PCdesc,Flex3,CC,CCdesc,CCCat,Flex5,TP,'R67',Flex4,'A',Flex9,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-SING'

Delete from IR17_Other_HudCAD where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R67' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M15')

Insert into IR17_Other_HudCAD (Co,Crcy,Co_Crcy,YearPeriod,GL,GL_Desc,PC,PC_Desc,Program,CC,CC_Desc,CCCat,CCCat_Desc,TP,Source,Incl_Excl,ACD,Portfolio_PC,Doc_QTD,Doc_ITD,LC_QTD,LC_ITD,LC2_QTD,LC2_ITD) Select Co,Crcy,Flex1,YearPeriod,GL,GLDesc,PC,PCdesc,Flex3,CC,CCdesc,CCCat,Flex5,TP,'R67',Flex4,'A',Flex9,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6 from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-HUDC'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data2',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M15')
Update x set Crcy = y.Field1 From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Swap' and y.Descr = x.Crcy where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Crcy,Co, GL, BusCat, CC, PC, Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6,Flex1) (select KeyID, YearPeriod, Crcy,Co, GL, BusCat, CC, PC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt5,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt6,0)),2),'pass1' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Crcy,Co, GL, BusCat, CC, PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt5 = 0 and Amt6 = 0

update TransX set Amt2 = round(Amt2 + Amt1,2),Amt4 = round(Amt4 + Amt3,2),Amt6 = round(Amt6 + Amt5,2), CCcat = substring(CC,4,1), Flex1 = '', Flex2 = substring(CC,4,1), Flex4 = 'I' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'CL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CCCat in ('C','H')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'UW' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CCCat in ('U','S','A')
update TransX set Flex4 = 'E' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not CCCat in ('U','S','A','C','H')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = c.Crcy, Flex6 = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Flex8 = p.Product, Flex3 = p.Program from TransX t inner join Pctrs p on t.PC = p.Pctr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set CCdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join Cctrs c on t.CC = c.Cctr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = c.Descr from TransX t inner join CCtrCats c on t.CCcat = c.Cat where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + 'AN' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex8 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Amt1 = Amt5, Amt2 = Amt6, Amt3 = round(Amt5/c.Rate,2), Amt4 = round(Amt6/c.Rate,2), Flex3 = x.Crcy, Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Flex1 and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]'
[ReplaceConnString][LockDownConnString]

Delete from IR17_Other where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R67' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'IF-ODY ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'

Delete from IR17_Other_Canada where YearPeriod in (Select distinct YearPeriod from [FX_Recon].dbo.TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]') and Source = 'R67' and substring('[BudAct]',1,7) = 'LG-CAD ' and not coalesce(Flex2,'') like '%adj%'
[ReplaceConnString][OriginalConnString]
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'B' and GL > '4000000'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
